steps: Master GitBook's MarkDown Programming Language https://commonmark.org https://gitbook.com/docs/guides/improve-your-docs/quick-tips-to-improve-your-technical-writing-workflow-in-gitbook
Know How To Add Images and Files to GitBook https://gitbook.com/docs/creating-content/blocks/insert-images https://gitbook.com/docs/creating-content/blocks/insert-files
Documents Library Information Science (LIS) Archiving https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Archive
Nonviolent Respect Language Stylistics https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nonviolent_Communication https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linguistics https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Stylistics

Rule of Law (RoL) Nonviolence Regulatory Compliance https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rule_of_law https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nonviolence https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulatory_compliance Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) by Felipe Ribeiro
Disclose Any Fiction in Documentary https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Docufiction
Life Track-Record Curriculum Vitae https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Curriculum_vitae Current Summarized Resume https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Résumé

Multimedia Documentation of Your Methodology in Action https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Photo_album https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sound_recording_and_reproduction https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Documentary_film https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portfolio
